Setup / Setup & Configuration
Setup & Configuration
Configure items, warehouses, and donors before recording transactions
Add Item
Unique System Item ID
Auto-assigned when you click "Add Item" — permanent, never editable
Item Name *
Tip: standardise where possible as SKU | Item Description — e.g. DFAT-0123 | Bed Nets
Item Code / SKU
Category *
Don't see the category you need? Add it from Setup & Configuration → Categories & UOM.
Unit of Measure (UOM) *
Don't see the UOM you need? Add it from Setup & Configuration → Categories & UOM.
Reorder Level
Optional. Triggers a low-stock alert on the Dashboard once on-hand quantity falls to or below this level. Leave blank to opt this item out of low-stock alerts.
RFID Tag Loop Type *
Closed loop: tag is retrieved & reused across cycles (e.g. durable equipment). Open loop: tag travels with the item and isn't recovered (e.g. consumable relief items).
Requires Batch / Expiry Tracking?

No items yet — add your first item
Add Warehouse Entry
Unique System Location ID
Auto-assigned when you click "Add Entry" — permanent, never editable
Hierarchy Level *
Parent Warehouse Site *
Parent Zone *
This site has no zones yet — switch the Hierarchy Level above to Zone and create one for this site first.
Name *
Code
Site Address / Description

Auto-assigned when you click "Add Donor" — permanent, never editable

Donor List

No donors yet — add your first donor
Categories
0 total
Deactivating hides a category from dropdowns going forward — items already using it are unaffected. Delete is only available once no item references it.
Units of Measure
0 total
Deactivating hides a UOM from dropdowns going forward — items already using it are unaffected. Delete is only available once no item references it. Conversion factors let stock received in one unit reconcile against the "EA" base unit.
Transactions / Goods Receiving
Goods Receiving
Record incoming stock, assign RFID tags, and confirm receipt
Web Portal — Manual Entry Mode. RFID/barcode scanning is performed on the Chainway C72 handheld reader (see sidebar). Use this form to manually record receipts and assign RFID tags, or launch the Mobile App Simulator from the sidebar to experience the scanning workflow.
Receipt Source
Receive from Warehouse Transfer
Select an in-transit transfer to receive against
In-Transit Transfer *
Transfer Details
From: —
To (Receiving): —
Shipment Order Ref: —
Date: —
Line Items
# Item From Zone Transfer Qty Received Qty
Enter the quantity that has physically arrived for each line. Leave at 0 if nothing has arrived yet, or enter less than the transfer qty for a partial delivery — the remainder stays on this transfer as still In Transit and can be received later.
Shipment Order Reference
Transaction Details
All fields marked * are required
GRN Reference *
Item Name *
Receiving Warehouse *
Quantity Received *
Donor / Funding Source *
Batch Number
Select an item to set batch tracking requirement
Expiry Date
Select an item to set expiry tracking requirement
Items In This GRN
ItemQtyBatchExpiry
No items added yet — fill in the item details above and click "Add Item to This GRN" for each item in the shipment, or leave this empty for a single-item receipt.
Saved Drafts
Mobile App
Chainway C72
Handheld RFID & Barcode Reader
Feature Comparison
  • Create GRN / receive stock
  • Select item & warehouse
  • Batch & expiry tracking
  • Donor assignment
  • RFID tag assignment
  • RFID antenna scan (C72)
  • Barcode scan (C72)
  • Manual tag entry (web)
  • Auto-generate EPC tags
Both   Mobile only   Web only
Quick Tips

Fill in transaction details, then assign RFID tags before confirming receipt.

Tags assigned here sync to the Asset Register automatically.

Transactions / Put-Away & Relocate
Put-Away & Location Transfer
Assign received stock to a permanent zone/location, or reorganise inventory between internal locations within the same warehouse
How this works: Select an item and its current location (where it was received), then choose the destination zone or location within the same or different site. Stock is moved immediately and the Asset Register is updated.
Put-Away / Relocate Stock
All fields required
Item Name *
From Location (Current) *
Quantity to Move *
To Location (Destination) *
Move Preview
From —
To —
Moving —
Select all fields to preview

DateItem NameFromToQty

Mobile App
Chainway C72
Handheld RFID & Barcode Reader
Feature Comparison
  • Select item & from-location
  • Move stock to destination
  • Live move preview
  • RFID antenna scan to confirm (C72)
  • Barcode scan to confirm (C72)
  • Manual location entry (web)
Both   Mobile only   Web only
Quick Tips

Confirm the From location matches where the stock is physically stored before moving.

Moves update the Asset Register immediately — no separate sync step needed.

Mobile App
Chainway C72
Handheld RFID & Barcode Reader
Feature Comparison
  • Create shipment order from the field
  • Add line items by item & location
  • RFID/donor/batch auto-filled from stock
  • RFID antenna scan to verify item (C72)
  • Export & print for shipment team (web)
Both   Mobile only   Web only
Quick Tips

Field staff can raise a shipment order directly from the C72 — no desk visit required.

Saved orders appear here immediately and can be actioned from Transfer or Beneficiary Distribution.

Item Name *
Site / Zone / Location *
On Hand: —
Already Tagged: —
Untagged: —
EPC Tag Assignment 0 / 0 tagged
Scan each unit's barcode or RFID tag (or type its unique ID) below. Every tag must be a unique physical read — tags are assigned when you click Save.

Mobile App
Chainway C72
Handheld RFID & Barcode Reader
Feature Comparison
  • Select item & location
  • Scan or enter unique EPC tags
  • Tags sync to Asset Register
  • RFID antenna scan (C72)
  • Barcode scan (C72)
  • Manual tag entry (web)
Both   Mobile only   Web only
Quick Tips

Assign one EPC tag per unit for full traceability.

Each tag must come from an actual barcode/RFID scan — auto-generated IDs aren't unique to a physical item.
